.file-embed.background: rgb(56, 49, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(56, 49, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(47, 42, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: rgb(56, 49, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(47, 42, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(47, 42, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(201, 84, 84) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(56, 49, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(47, 42, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(56, 49, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(47, 42, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(47, 42, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(201, 84, 84, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(47, 42, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(56, 49, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].font-family: "Source Serif Pro", "Source Serif 4", "Source Serif", Rockwell, "New York", serif

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(47, 42, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(56, 49, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(117, 107, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(56, 49, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(56, 49, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgb(152, 137, 130) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
